Make and offer on this 2/2 in Lancaster III and on a CORNER LOT! - Enjoy the carefree lifestyle in the GATED community of Kings Point!  This is a PET FRIENDLY LOCATION. A front screened porch greets you as you walk through the front door  … Perfect for your morning coffee! The living and dining spaces are open and allows for a comfortable space for daily living. There is a dinette/breakfast nook that is ideal for meals, casual seating or even an office! The split floor plan has the master bedroom located in the rear of the home with plenty of closets. The room is GRAND with windows that provide plenty of natural light! The en suite has dual sinks, and a WALK IN SHOWER! The second bedroom is located on the other side of the home with the bathroom adjacent to bedroom, making your guests more comfortable! Enjoy the Florida room with a wall of windows and space for so many options such as crafts, tv room, etc.  A BRAND NEW WATER HEATER was installed in October of 2023 and a like new garage screen that provides wonderful privacy awaits you in your spacious garage. KINGS POINT is a GOLF CART friendly, 55+ active community with over 200 clubs & activities, multiple indoor/outdoor pools, fitness, pickle ball, and so much more! Fees include cable, internet, exterior insurance, maintenance grounds, private road, security, water, trash, sewer & more! Location is close to restaurants, beaches, shopping and more!  If you plan on venturing out,  there is quick access to restaurants, SHOPPING, and beaches. Your are 30 minutes to Tampa International Airport, less than an hour to the Sarasota shops, and 20 minutes to the Ellenton Prime Outlets!
